parameters: Just to let you know Otoko,\! I'm not mad at all.\! Just watch a little more
Even if you did engage,\! maybe try to get Guy's help next time?\! Especially
if it's who I think it is.
Yeah yeah...\! All I hear is:\! "Deal with your own problems,\! stop being
aloof and air headed,\! act your age."\!
You're doing such a good job protecting me...
I'm still sorry for everything.\! And I wanna make it up to you somehow...
Mr. Anagram!\! Right!\! You're still over here!
Sorry you had to see that... haha...\!
Yknow Mr. Anagram,\! I would help ya out here-\! genuinely.\! But Otoko
needs me right here with him.\! You're his roomate,\! you'd understand.
I've never seen this place before in my life.

This is unsafe and you know it. Lets get out of here before

Maybe we could cram into your shower or something Oko'.
Now I have no choice to find the source of these vines.\! And I think
I have an idea of who's the cause.
You two can relax for a bit.\!
Otoko,\! we'll chat about this later.\! Alright?

I'll still take you up on your offer though~!\!

No more ignoring...\! No more forgetting!\! I'm here-\! RIGHT NOW!

It makes so much sense now!
I mysteriously arrive back home through an elevator in X-Labs...\!
Then a mysterious spa shows up...\!
Absolutely Bogus.\! I'll inact my radical plan for your murder whenever

WE'RE GONNA FIGHT!\! AND ITS GONNA BE DA BOMB!\!

No grand speech?\! No "I'll get you next time?"\!
